executives.name: Donna Morea
executives.background: Ms. Morea has served as Chair of the Board since 2019. She was previously President of CGI Technologies and Solutions. She is an expert in IT professional services and strategic management.

executives.name: Linnie Haynesworth
executives.background: Ms. Haynesworth was a Sector Vice President and General Manager at Northrop Grumman Corporation.
